channel.title: Tay Township Weather Alerts
channel.description: Automated Environment Canada weather alerts and statements for Tay Township and surrounding areas.

item.title: YELLOW WARNING - RAINFALL (Tay Township area)
item.description: YELLOW WARNING - RAINFALL (Tay Township area) Issued: 1:06 AM EDT Monday 13 April 2026 More info (Tay Township): https://tayweather.short.gy/alert Official alert details: https://weather.gc.ca/warnings/report_e.html?onrm94
